response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including C and C++ roles, but his primary expertise lies in web, mobile, and embedded systems using languages like TypeScript, Node.js, and D. He lacks recent, focused experience in high-performance C++ for industrial automation, secure development lifecycle practices, or cloud platforms like Azure. His background in IoT and industrial protocols is also minimal, making his fit for the role suboptimal.
strengths: Strong background in C/C++ from early career roles (National Instruments, Altom Consulting)
Experience with high-performance, low-latency systems and asynchronous I/O (Dlang, Node.js)
Proven track record in mentoring, open-source contributions, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ (last significant C++ roles were 2014–2015; current work focuses on TypeScript/Node.js)
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, secure development lifecycle, or industrial cybersecurity standards
Lacks exposure to cloud platforms (e.g., Azure), IoT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA), or automation machinery contexts
